SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
CharacterDatabaseService
CharacterDatabaseService is a Spring service class that provides business logic for managing character entities in the application.
CharacterEntity
CharacterEntity represents a character created by a user in the application.
CharacterRepository
CharacterRepository is a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing CharacterEntity objects.
CharactersController
Controller for handling character-related operations such as listing, viewing, creating, editing, and deleting characters.
ClassDatabaseService
Service class for handling business logic related to ClassEntity.
ClassEntity
ClassEntity represents a character class in the application.
ClassRepository
ClassRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for ClassEntity objects.
CloudAppApplication
CloudAppApplication is the main entry point for the Spring Boot application.
HomeController
HomeController is responsible for handling requests to the home page of the application.
RaceDatabaseService
Service class for handling business logic related to races.
RaceEntity
RaceEntity represents a character race in the application.
RaceRepository
RaceRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for RaceEntity objects.
UserController
UserController is responsible for handling user authentication and registration processes in the application.
UserDatabaseService
Service class for handling user-related database operations.
UserEntity
UserEntity represents a user of the application.
UserRepository
UserRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for UserEntity objects.
